Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Set a global variable used by other scripts to key/value pairs used by agentic-fm.

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Validate path

Message.Calculation: "Please clear the $$AGENTIC.FM global variable and run the script again to select the agentic-fm folder."

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Push out solution XML to be parsed for AI use.

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: INTERACTIVE MODE (FM Pro): Run with no parameter. Saves XML to desktop, POSTs to localhost:8765/explode. Requires companion server running and $$AGENTIC.FM configured. SERVER MODE (OData via AGFMScriptBridge): Pass JSON parameter with keys: repo_path — absolute POSIX path to the agentic-fm project root on the companion server host export_path — absolute POSIX path where FMS will write the XML export (must be host-accessible) companion_url — base URL of the companion server (e.g. http://host.docker.internal:8765) solution_name — (optional) override solution name; defaults to Get(FileName) NOTE: export_path must be a path FMS can write to AND the companion server host can read. On a Linux FMS container with a host-mounted Data dir, use that mount path. The FM path is constructed as "filelinux:" & export_path — adjust prefix for other OS. RETURNS (server mode): companion server response JSON { success, exit_code, stdout, stderr }

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: MARK: Server mode

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Build FM path: filelinux: prefix for FMS on Linux. Adjust for other OS.

Step.name: Exit Script
Exit Script
# (comment)
Step.Text: MARK: Interactive mode

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: DEPENDENCY: The companion server must be running (agent/scripts/companion_server.py)

Message.Calculation: "The agentic-fm install was not found. Please check the $$AGENTIC.FM global variable"
"Start the companion server first:¶¶python3 agent/scripts/companion_server.py¶¶Then run Explode XML again."
"The XML has been placed into agentic-fm's xml_parsed folder." & If ( not IsEmpty ( $stdout ) ; "¶¶" & $stdout ; "" )

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Push the current layout context to agentic-fm.

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: INTERACTIVE MODE (FM Pro): Run with no parameter. Prompts for task description, writes CONTEXT.json directly via file steps. SERVER MODE (OData via AGFMScriptBridge): Pass JSON parameter with keys: task — task description string repo_path — absolute POSIX path to the agentic-fm project root on the companion server host companion_url — base URL of the companion server (e.g. http://host.docker.internal:8765) CONTEXT.json is written by the companion server at {repo_path}/agent/CONTEXT.json. RETURNS (server mode): JSON { success, path } or { success, error }

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: MARK: Server mode

Step.name: Exit Script
# (comment)
Step.Text: MARK: Interactive mode

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Check for a valid install.

Message.Calculation: "The agentic-fm install was not found. Please check the $$AGENTIC.FM global variable"
"Please describe the task you're trying to accomplish with the script."

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Not the best method but this will delete the existing file.

Message.Calculation: "You may now use AI to modify or create your script."

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Navigate to a layout by name. For use via OData/AGFMBridge.

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: PARAMETER: JSON object with key: layout — exact name of the layout to navigate to RETURNS: JSON { success, layout, tableOccurrence } on success JSON { success, error } on failure EXAMPLE call via AGFMBridge: { "script": "AGFMGoToLayout", "parameter": "{\"layout\": \"Invoices\"}" }

Step.name: Exit Script
Exit Script
# (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: OData bridge — accepts JSON { script, parameter } and performs the named script

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: PARAMETER: JSON object with keys: script — name of the script to run parameter — value to pass as script parameter (optional) RETURNS: JSON { success, script, result } on success JSON { success, error } on failure CALLED VIA: OData POST /fmi/odata/v4/{db}/Script.AGFMScriptBridge body: { "scriptParameterValue": "{\"script\":\"Push Context\",\"parameter\":\"...\"}" }

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: MARK:Input

Step.name: Exit Script
# (comment)
Step.Text: MARK:Resolve

Step.name: Exit Script
# (comment)
Step.Text: MARK:Execute

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Start or stop the agentic-fm webviewer from within FileMaker.

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: DEPENDENCY: The companion server must be running (agent/scripts/companion_server.py)

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text:
⚡

Companion server offline

Start the server, then run the script 'Agentic-fm webviewer' to launch agentic-fm.

python3 agent/scripts/companion_server.py

Message.Calculation: "The agentic-fm install was not found. Please check the $$AGENTIC.FM global variable"

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Check webviewer status.

Message.Calculation: "Start the companion server first:¶¶python3 agent/scripts/companion_server.py¶¶Then run Start agentic-fm again."
"The agentic-fm webviewer is running at:¶¶http://localhost:8080¶¶Stop it?"
If ( $httpError ≠ 0 ; "Could not reach the companion server." ; JSONGetElement ( $response ; "error" ) )

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Start the webviewer.

Message.Calculation: If ( $httpError ≠ 0 ; "Could not reach the companion server." ; JSONGetElement ( $response ; "error" ) )
"The agentic-fm webviewer is now running at:¶¶http://localhost:8080"

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Refresh any agentic-fm web viewer.

Step.name: If
Step.Calculation: Position ( LayoutObjectNames ( Get ( FileName ) ; Get ( LayoutName ) ) ; "agentic-fm" ; 1 ; 1 )

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Handle all menu calls from a custom menu and pass through to a web viewer.

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: NOTE: This relies on a custom menu set being attached to the layout where the agentic-fm web viewer object is being used.

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: MBS-powered paste into Script Workspace. Used by Tier 2/3 deployment via companion /trigger.

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: CALLED BY: companion server /trigger endpoint via AppleScript The companion sets the job via POST /pending before firing do script. This script GETs /pending to retrieve: target (script name), auto_save (bool). RETURNS: JSON { success, script } or { success, error } REQUIRES: MBS Plugin with ScriptWorkspace and Menubar functions WARNING: FileMaker will block script execution with a dialog if any scripts have unsaved changes. Ensure AGFMPaste itself is saved before running deployments. auto_save uses "Save All Scripts" which saves all open scripts in the workspace. NOTE: Menubar command IDs — Select All: 57636, Paste: 57637 Verify these against MBS docs if paste behaviour is unexpected.

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Fetch the pending job from the companion server

Step.name: Exit Script
# (comment)
Step.Text: Busy-wait 0.5s to allow Script Workspace to finish rendering before paste

Step.name: Perform AppleScript
Step.Text: tell application "System Events" to keystroke "s" using {command down}

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Write runtime debug state to agent/debug/output.json for agent inspection.

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Called by other scripts via Perform Script with a JSON parameter.

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: lastError and lastErrorLocation are captured as the very first step so they reflect the caller's error state — any successful Set Variable resets Get(LastError) to 0. PARAMETER FORMAT: JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; [ "label" ; "description of this debug point" ; JSONString ] ; [ "vars" ; JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; [ "myVar" ; $myVar ; JSONString ] ) ; JSONRaw ] ) To capture current line number (no real error), force a harmless error immediately before Perform Script in the calling script: Set Error Capture [ On ] Set Field [] Perform Script [ "Agentic-fm Debug" ; Parameter: ... ] Set Error Capture [ Off ]

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Capture caller's error state before any other step can reset Get(LastError) to 0

Message.Calculation: "Companion server not running. Start it with:¶¶python3 agent/scripts/companion_server.py"

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: Example of how to call Agentic-fm Debug

Step.name: Perform Script
